instruction: In a group of students, |A| = {a_size} students are in club A, |B| = {b_size} students are in club B, and |A cap B| = {inter_size} students are in both. How many students are in at least one club (|A union B|)?
steps: Use the inclusion-exclusion principle: |A union B| = |A| + |B| - |A cap B|.
